_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: CD11b and CD68 label the same population of cells in the optic nerves...over 99% of the cells analyzed were positive for both CD11b and Iba1
details: Labels the same population of cells as CD68 in mouse optic nerves, with over 99% co-labeling with Iba1
